summary: Excellent recording capturing a great second set that shouldn't be missed
review: The reviewer praises this Holtz‑sourced tape as a high‑quality capture of an outstanding show, highlighting the strength of the second set. No technical flaws are mentioned, and the overall tone is very positive.
